title: Uragoga ruiziana
properties: Uragoga ruiziana is reportedly used in traditional medicine, and it is said to possess various therapeutic properties. The plant may have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which could be beneficial in treating various health conditions. Its leaves are also used in folk medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. However, more research is required to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Uragoga ruiziana as a treatment. Its potential as a natural remedy for various ailments makes it an area of interest for scientists studying medicinal plants.

However, as a plant, it may cause some general side effects if ingested, such as stomach upset, nausea, or allergic reactions.
